1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and centroid (kommunenummer needed for later filters)

2.description: read quick-clay risk class code mapping

6.description: get buildings in Trondheim municipality (filter by kommunenummer)

7.description: find buildings that intersect high-risk quick-clay polygons

8.description: compute distances from municipality centroid to the intersecting buildings and return top 10 closest

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade, ST_Centroid(omrade) AS centroid FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%trondheim%';

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT DISTINCT skredrisikokvikkleireklasse FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlopomr ORDER BY skredrisikokvikkleireklasse;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT objid, skredrisikokvikkleireklasse, omrade FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlopomr WHERE skredrisikokvikkleireklasse IS NOT NULL LIMIT 5;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and centroid

2.description: inspect distinct quick-clay risk class values

3.description: get buildings in Trondheim (filter by kommunenummer)

4.description: select quick-clay hazard areas with the high-risk class (value to be filled after inspecting step 2 results)

5.description: reduce quick-clay areas to those intersecting Trondheim municipality

6.description: find buildings that intersect the reduced quick-clay areas

7.description: compute distance from each intersecting building to municipality centroid
